herosection.h3:
British precision. Mexican heart. 
 The morning view of a lifetime.
herosection.paragraph:
Over decades, we have learned that the finest adventures 
 are those shaped by meticulous attention to detail 
 and an unwavering commitment to safety.
herosection.poweredBy:
Welcome to the highest standard of certified 
 aviation in the Teotihuacán Valley.

descriptions.shared: Ideal for solo travellers, friends, couples and groups. Enjoy a compartmented basket design that guarantees every guest their own clear view of the valley. Upgrade your flight with private transport, breakfast, and other optional extras.
descriptions.private: Ideal for solo travellers, friends, couples and groups. Enjoy a compartmented basket design that guarantees every guest their own clear view of the valley. Upgrade your flight with private transport, breakfast, and other optional extras.
descriptions.vip: Ideal for solo travellers, friends, couples and groups. Enjoy a compartmented basket design that guarantees every guest their own clear view of the valley. Upgrade your flight with private transport, breakfast, and other optional extras.

awardSection.title: Award-winning
awardSection.subtitle: AVIATION COMPANY
awardSection.description: Xperience the most trusted and distinguished hot air balloon operation in Mexico Where British attention to detail meets the vibrant spirit of Mexico. For more than twenty years, Flying Pictures Mexico has set the gold standard for safe, beautifully executed flights over the extraordinary Teotihuacán Valley.

tradition.title: More Than a Flight A Tradition.
tradition.description: As you rise with the first light, the valley reveals itself below the majestic contours of the ancient city and, if fortune favours you, miles of golden horizon. Each moment feels perfectly composed: calm, elegant, and quietly unforgettable.

other.title: Safety Always Comes First.
other.description: Our fully licensed pilots bring years often decades of experience to every ascent. With comprehensive passenger insurance included, a traditional celebratory toast upon landing, and the tranquil beauty of sunrise across the valley, each flight reflects a balance of professionalism and heritage.

safety.title: Safety Always Comes First.
safety.description: Our fully licensed pilots bring years — often decades — of experience to every ascent. With comprehensive passenger insurance included, a traditional celebratory toast upon landing, and the tranquil beauty of sunrise across the valley, each flight reflects a balance of professionalism and heritage.

whyChoose.title: WHY FLY WITH US
whyChoose.await: Whether marking a special occasion, discovering history, or realising a lifelong dream, your journey becomes part of a tradition of excellence one refined over four decades of international aviation leadership by our founders.

reasons.title: Unrivalled Equipment.
reasons.description: We primarily fly Cameron Balloons of the United Kingdom, widely regarded as the benchmark in global balloon design and manufacture. Engineered for performance, safety, and enduring quality, they reflect the standards to which we hold every flight.

reasons.title: The One-Flight Rule.
reasons.description: By restricting daily departures, we preserve a measured pace and a more considered passenger experience, ensuring exceptional flights above the Teotihuacán Valley and its timeless pyramids.

reasons.title: A British Mind, a Mexican Heart.
reasons.description: Founded by Sean and Diana Byrne, Flying Pictures blends precision engineering with authentic hospitality where every operational detail is orchestrated with absolute care.

reviews.dontJustTakeOurWord: Do not simply take our word for it;
reviews.Subtittle: Discover why discerning travellers and global icons trust our expertise.

items.name: Javier S.
items.text: Their gear is Cameron from Bristol, and unlike most companies, they have all licenses up-to-date. Do not compromise your safety to save a few dollars. Go with the best.

items.name: Mike B.
items.quote: Out of all the adventures we did, this was the best
items.text: No hidden costs (very unusual). Please do it if you are in Mexico City, you won't regret it.

items.name: Robert C.
items.text: The reception was warm (coffee and heaters for the cold morning!), and the pilot totally nailed the beautiful views.

items.name: Emily R.
items.text: The flight was smooth, and the views were breathtaking. The team was professional and made us feel safe throughout the entire experience.

weather.heading: Weather Intelligence: We never leave safety to chance.
weather.description: Our flight decisions are guided by real-time meteorological data, advanced forecasting, and disciplined risk assessment. In aviation, the environment dictates the operation and we respect its parameters to ensure your absolute safety.

safetyPromise.title: The Safety Promise
safetyPromise.description: If the weather is not suitable, we don't fly. We would rather keep you on the ground than risk you in the air.

viewPromise.title: The View Promise
viewPromise.description: We fly to witness the awakening of the valley. Sometimes we are gifted with a golden sunrise; other times, a mystic mist wraps the pyramids in silence. Both spectacles are decided by nature.
